scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently --names "api,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:api --prefix backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:frontend: rimraf frontend/.next && npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d timescaledb redis mosquitto && docker compose run --rm db-migrate
scripts.dev:stack: npm run dev:free-ports && npm run dev:infra && npx --yes concurrently --names "simulate,ingest,process,api,frontend,edge" --prefix-colors "blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow,red" "npm run dev:simulate --prefix backend" "npm run dev:ingest --prefix backend" "npm run dev:process --prefix backend" "npm run dev:api --prefix backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "python edge_ai/optical_sentry.py"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r edge_ai/requirements.txt
